title: The Admin Tool
description: A device that opens a menu with a lot of useful options
body:
---

## ![https://i.imgur.com/GkQD5J2.png](https://i.imgur.com/GkQD5J2.png) 
## *The Admin Tool*

* *An advanced and user-friendly in-game interface designed for both server admins and singleplayer users.*

---
## ▶️ **The Tool**
![https://i.imgur.com/ToAG3iZ.png](https://i.imgur.com/ToAG3iZ.png)

---
## ▶️ **How to use**
> *You can get a dedicated Admin Tool item to access all menus from your hotbar (Creative only).*

**Run this command to open the admin tool main menu:**

```
/dialog show @s admin_tools:main_menu
```

**To get the Admin Tool item (Creative only):**

```
/function admin_tools:1_give_admin_tool
```

> *Note: In **Datapack Version**, the **resource pack** is required to display the Admin Tool correctly.*

---

## ▶️ **Current Features**

### **■ Player Settings**
#### 
<details>
<summary> Ban a player</summary>
  
![https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/data-pack/2025/667/18911972-image_l.webp](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/data-pack/2025/667/18911972-image_l.webp)
Allows banning a player by entering their name, reason, and duration.

</details>



<details>
<summary> Kick a player</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/9MmaS9F.png](https://i.imgur.com/9MmaS9F.png)
Disconnects a specified player from the server without banning them.
</details>


<details>
<summary> Kill a player</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/kASyemS.png](https://i.imgur.com/kASyemS.png)
Kills a specified player instantly using the `/kill` command.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Apply effect</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/vGeVcM4.png](https://i.imgur.com/vGeVcM4.png)
Apply potion effects to yourself or another player, choosing effect type, duration, and level.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Apply effect (advanced)</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/NOtu5wb.png](https://i.imgur.com/NOtu5wb.png)
Allows applying a custom potion effect to yourself or another player by setting effect ID, duration, and level.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Gamemode switcher</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/7WQCmIJ.png](https://i.imgur.com/7WQCmIJ.png)
Switch gamemode for yourself or others quickly.
</details>


<details>
<summary> Teleport to player / location</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/ilLldOv.png](https://i.imgur.com/ilLldOv.png)
Teleports you to a specified player or coordinates by entering the exact player name or position.
</details>


<details>
<summary> Modify player attributes</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/IjHagfn.png](https://i.imgur.com/IjHagfn.png)
Modify a player’s attribute base value by selecting the player, attribute, and new value
</details>


<details>
<summary> Set player spawnpoint</summary>
  
![https://i.imgur.com/6KEQi0u.png](https://i.imgur.com/6KEQi0u.png)
Set a player’s spawnpoint by specifying the player and coordinates X, Y, Z.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Give Armor Kit</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/vlvpido.png](https://i.imgur.com/vlvpido.png)
Select an armor kit material and give it to the targeted player.
</details>

### **■ World Settings**
####

<details>
<summary> Time changer</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/kDeTDSF.png](https://i.imgur.com/kDeTDSF.png)
Set the time of day by choosing ticks.
</details>


<details>
<summary> Weather changer</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/WsvnTHs.png](https://i.imgur.com/WsvnTHs.png)
Set custom weather type and duration in ticks.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Set world spawn</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/eHv6cUL.png](https://i.imgur.com/eHv6cUL.png)
Set the global spawn point by entering X, Y, Z coordinates.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Difficulty changer</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/mjKfwkf.png](https://i.imgur.com/mjKfwkf.png)
Select the world difficulty (peaceful, easy, normal, hard).
</details>

<details>
<summary> Advanced mob spawner</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/zGJe3gS.png](https://i.imgur.com/zGJe3gS.png)
Summon a mob with detailed options: name, attributes, equipment, effects, size, visibility, and more.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Mob control</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/6SiPus9.png](https://i.imgur.com/6SiPus9.png)
Spawn or kill selected mobs easily by choosing the mob type and amount.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Modify entity attributes</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/WrrQjDR.png](https://i.imgur.com/WrrQjDR.png)
Edit the base attribute value of the nearest mob within 10 blocks.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Set Custom Mob Spawner</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/yi2yt16.png](https://i.imgur.com/yi2yt16.png)
Configure a custom mob spawner by adjusting spawn parameters, equipment, effects, and custom light conditions.
</details>


### **■ Utility Settings**
####

<details>
<summary> Broadcast title</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/5jWDA04.png](https://i.imgur.com/5jWDA04.png)
Send global announcements with formatted messages.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Items cleaner</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/ZWEALQH.png](https://i.imgur.com/ZWEALQH.png)
Removes dropped items.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Custom item creator</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/qBjLbhD.png](https://i.imgur.com/qBjLbhD.png)
Create custom items with names, lore, enchantments, and attribute modifiers.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Dimension switcher</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/UUvNfYZ.png](https://i.imgur.com/UUvNfYZ.png)
Select a dimension to teleport to. Custom IDs allowed.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Create text display</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/FktNCWJ.png](https://i.imgur.com/FktNCWJ.png)
Create `text_display` entities with full control over text style, alignment, size, color, visibility, rotation, and more.
</details>

<details>
<summary> Edit text display</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/SYmHTSK.png](https://i.imgur.com/SYmHTSK.png)
Edit existing `text_display` entities in the world directly.
</details>


#### Teams manager:

<details>
<summary> Create a team</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/DiNSAFQ.png](https://i.imgur.com/DiNSAFQ.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Delete a team</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/k0bFcDo.png](https://i.imgur.com/k0bFcDo.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Manage team members</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/ZFRoY9e.png](https://i.imgur.com/ZFRoY9e.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Edit team settings</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/W4nsXdo.png](https://i.imgur.com/W4nsXdo.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary> Show team list</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/HqCHPkh.png](https://i.imgur.com/HqCHPkh.png)
</details>


### **■ Quick Settings:**

<details>
<summary> Set Ranks</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/SnIYHLv.png](https://i.imgur.com/SnIYHLv.png)
Set predefined ranks easily (just visual prefix, not perms).
</details>

### **■ Fun Settings**

<details>
<summary> Explosion generator</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/JLGBHHA.png](https://i.imgur.com/JLGBHHA.png)
Generate TNT with adjustable explosion power and fuse timer.
</details>

### **■ Gamerules Settings**

*Toggle gamerules through categorized menus with activate/deactivate options:*

<details>
<summary> Gamerules menu</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/Zyvtq5N.png](https://i.imgur.com/Zyvtq5N.png)

</details>


### **■ Help Menu**

* *Contains information and tips about how to use every menu*

<details>
<summary> Help dialog example</summary>

![https://i.imgur.com/Pt2gKYc.png](https://i.imgur.com/Pt2gKYc.png)

</details>


## ▶️ **Details**

* *Perfect for adventure map creators, server operators, or singleplayer users who want control without commands*
* *Still in development – new tools and menu categories will be added in future updates*
* *Suggestions, bug reports, and feature requests are welcome!*

---
